languages.text: If wielder's Melee attack is Critical Hit, dodged or parried, wielder gains {uip|MP|9770450e394948eda42029e4b648221e} Movement Points and doesn't provoke Attacks of Opportunity until the end of their turn.

traits.locale_text: If wielder's Melee attack is Critical Hit, dodged or parried, wielder gains {uip|MP|9770450e394948eda42029e4b648221e} Movement Points and doesn't provoke Attacks of Opportunity until the end of their turn.

languages.text: If the wearer's {g|Encyclopedia:MeleeAttacksGlossary}melee attack{/g} is {g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}dodged{/g}, {g|Encyclopedia:Parry}parried{/g}, or scores a {g|Encyclopedia:CritChancesAndCritDamageGlossary}critical hit{/g}, the wearer regains +{unit_stat|WarhammerAgility|bonus} {g|Encyclopedia:MovementPoints}MP{/g} and does not provoke {g|Encyclopedia:AttackOfOpportunityFullGlossary}attacks of opportunity{/g} until the end of their {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turn{/g}.

traits.locale_text: If the wearer's melee attack is dodged or parried or scores a critical hit, the wearer regains +{uip|MP|9770450e394948eda42029e4b648221e} MP and does not provoke attacks of opportunity until the end of their turn.

If the wearer's {g|Encyclopedia:MeleeAttacksGlossary}melee attack{/g} is {g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}dodged{/g}, {g|Encyclopedia:Parry}parried{/g}, or scores a {g|Encyclopedia:CritChancesAndCritDamageGlossary}critical hit{/g}, the wearer regains +{unit_stat|WarhammerAgility|bonus} {g|Encyclopedia:MovementPoints}MP{/g} and does not provoke {g|Encyclopedia:AttackOfOpportunityFullGlossary}attacks of opportunity{/g} until the end of their {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turn{/g}.

If the wearer's {g|Encyclopedia:MeleeAttacksGlossary}melee attack{/g} is {g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}dodged{/g}, {g|Encyclopedia:Parry}parried{/g}, or scores a {g|Encyclopedia:CritChancesAndCritDamageGlossary}critical hit{/g}, the wearer regains +{unit_stat|WarhammerAgility|bonus} {g|Encyclopedia:MovementPoints}MP{/g} and does not provoke {g|Encyclopedia:AttackOfOpportunityFullGlossary}attacks of opportunity{/g} until the end of their {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turn{/g}.

If the wearer's {g|Encyclopedia:MeleeAttacksGlossary}melee attack{/g} is {g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}dodged{/g}, {g|Encyclopedia:Parry}parried{/g}, or scores a {g|Encyclopedia:CritChancesAndCritDamageGlossary}critical hit{/g}, the wearer regains +{unit_stat|WarhammerAgility|bonus} {g|Encyclopedia:MovementPoints}MP{/g} and does not provoke {g|Encyclopedia:AttackOfOpportunityFullGlossary}attacks of opportunity{/g} until the end of their {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turn{/g}.

languages.text: Takan kişinin {g|Encyclopedia:MeleeAttacksGlossary}yakın dövüş saldırısına{/g} karşı {g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}kaçınma{/g} veya {g|Encyclopedia:Parry}savuşturma{/g} yapılırsa ya da bu saldırı {g|Encyclopedia:CritChancesAndCritDamageGlossary}kritik vuruş{/g} indirirse takan kişi, +{unit_stat|WarhammerAgility|bonus} {g|Encyclopedia:MovementPoints}HP{/g} geri kazanır ve {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turunun{/g} sonuna dek {g|Encyclopedia:AttackOfOpportunityFullGlossary}fırsat saldırılarını{/g} tetiklemez.
languages.original_text: If the wearer's {g|Encyclopedia:MeleeAttacksGlossary}melee attack{/g} is {g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}dodged{/g}, {g|Encyclopedia:Parry}parried{/g}, or scores a {g|Encyclopedia:CritChancesAndCritDamageGlossary}critical hit{/g}, the wearer regains +{unit_stat|WarhammerAgility|bonus} {g|Encyclopedia:MovementPoints}MP{/g} and does not provoke {g|Encyclopedia:AttackOfOpportunityFullGlossary}attacks of opportunity{/g} until the end of their {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turn{/g}.

traits.locale_text: Takan kişinin yakın dövüş saldırısına karşı kaçınma veya savuşturma yapılırsa ya da bu saldırı kritik vuruş indirirse takan kişi, +{unit_stat|WarhammerAgility|bonus} HP geri kazanır ve turunun sonuna dek fırsat saldırılarını tetiklemez.

Takan kişinin yakın dövüş saldırısına karşı {g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}kaçınma{/g} veya savuşturma yapılırsa ya da bu saldırı {g|Encyclopedia:CritChancesAndCritDamageGlossary}kritik vuruş{/g} indirirse takan kişi, +{unit_stat|WarhammerAgility|bonus} HP geri kazanır ve {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turunun{/g} sonuna dek fırsat saldırılarını tetiklemez.

languages.text: Si el ataque {g|Encyclopedia:MeleeAttacksGlossary}cuerpo a cuerpo{/g} del portador se {g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}esquiva{/g}, se {g|Encyclopedia:Parry}para{/g} o asesta un {g|Encyclopedia:CritChancesAndCritDamageGlossary}impacto crítico{/g}, el portador recupera +{unit_stat|WarhammerAgility|bonus} {g|Encyclopedia:MovementPoints}PM{/g} y no provocará {g|Encyclopedia:AttackOfOpportunityFullGlossary}ataques de oportunidad{/g} hasta el final de su {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turno{/g}.
languages.original_text: If the wearer's {g|Encyclopedia:MeleeAttacksGlossary}melee attack{/g} is {g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}dodged{/g}, {g|Encyclopedia:Parry}parried{/g}, or scores a {g|Encyclopedia:CritChancesAndCritDamageGlossary}critical hit{/g}, the wearer regains +{unit_stat|WarhammerAgility|bonus} {g|Encyclopedia:MovementPoints}MP{/g} and does not provoke {g|Encyclopedia:AttackOfOpportunityFullGlossary}attacks of opportunity{/g} until the end of their {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turn{/g}.

traits.locale_text: Si el ataque cuerpo a cuerpo del portador se esquiva, se para o asesta un impacto crítico, el portador recupera +{unit_stat|WarhammerAgility|bonus} PM y no provocará ataques de oportunidad hasta el final de su turno.

languages.text: 如果装备者的{g|Encyclopedia:MeleeAttacksGlossary}近战攻击{/g}被{g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}闪避{/g}、被{g|Encyclopedia:Parry}招架{/g}或造成{g|Encyclopedia:CritChancesAndCritDamageGlossary}暴击{/g}，则装备者恢复{unit_stat|WarhammerAgility|bonus}点{g|Encyclopedia:MovementPoints}移动点数{/g}，且在{g|Encyclopedia:Turn}回合{/g}结束前不会触发{g|Encyclopedia:AttackOfOpportunityFullGlossary}借机攻击{/g}。
languages.original_text: If the wearer's {g|Encyclopedia:MeleeAttacksGlossary}melee attack{/g} is {g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}dodged{/g}, {g|Encyclopedia:Parry}parried{/g}, or scores a {g|Encyclopedia:CritChancesAndCritDamageGlossary}critical hit{/g}, the wearer regains +{unit_stat|WarhammerAgility|bonus} {g|Encyclopedia:MovementPoints}MP{/g} and does not provoke {g|Encyclopedia:AttackOfOpportunityFullGlossary}attacks of opportunity{/g} until the end of their {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turn{/g}.

traits.locale_text: 如果装备者的近战攻击被闪避、被招架或造成暴击，则装备者恢复{unit_stat|WarhammerAgility|bonus}点移动点数，且在回合结束前不会触发借机攻击。

languages.text: Wird einem {g|Encyclopedia:MeleeAttacksGlossary}Nahkampfangriff{/g} des Trägers {g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}ausgewichen{/g}, wird er {g|Encyclopedia:Parry}pariert{/g} oder erzielt er einen {g|Encyclopedia:CritChancesAndCritDamageGlossary}kritischen Treffer{/g}, erhält der Träger +{unit_stat|WarhammerAgility|bonus} {g|Encyclopedia:MovementPoints}BP{/g} und provoziert bis zum Ende seines {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}Zugs{/g} keine {g|Encyclopedia:AttackOfOpportunityFullGlossary}Gelegenheitsangriffe{/g}.
languages.original_text: If the wearer's {g|Encyclopedia:MeleeAttacksGlossary}melee attack{/g} is {g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}dodged{/g}, {g|Encyclopedia:Parry}parried{/g}, or scores a {g|Encyclopedia:CritChancesAndCritDamageGlossary}critical hit{/g}, the wearer regains +{unit_stat|WarhammerAgility|bonus} {g|Encyclopedia:MovementPoints}MP{/g} and does not provoke {g|Encyclopedia:AttackOfOpportunityFullGlossary}attacks of opportunity{/g} until the end of their {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turn{/g}.

traits.locale_text: Wird einem Nahkampfangriff des Trägers ausgewichen, wird er pariert oder erzielt er einen kritischen Treffer, erhält der Träger +{unit_stat|WarhammerAgility|bonus} BP und provoziert bis zum Ende seines Zugs keine Gelegenheitsangriffe.

languages.text: Si l'{g|Encyclopedia:MeleeAttacksGlossary}attaque de mêlée{/g} du porteur est {g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}esquivée{/g}, {g|Encyclopedia:Parry}parée{/g} ou inflige un {g|Encyclopedia:CritChancesAndCritDamageGlossary}coup critique{/g}, le porteur récupère +{unit_stat|WarhammerAgility|bonus} {g|Encyclopedia:MovementPoints}PD{/g} et ne provoque pas d'{g|Encyclopedia:AttackOfOpportunityFullGlossary}attaques d'opportunité{/g} jusqu'à la fin de son {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}tour{/g}.
languages.original_text: If the wearer's {g|Encyclopedia:MeleeAttacksGlossary}melee attack{/g} is {g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}dodged{/g}, {g|Encyclopedia:Parry}parried{/g}, or scores a {g|Encyclopedia:CritChancesAndCritDamageGlossary}critical hit{/g}, the wearer regains +{unit_stat|WarhammerAgility|bonus} {g|Encyclopedia:MovementPoints}MP{/g} and does not provoke {g|Encyclopedia:AttackOfOpportunityFullGlossary}attacks of opportunity{/g} until the end of their {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turn{/g}.

traits.locale_text: Si l'attaque de mêlée du porteur est esquivée, parée ou inflige un coup critique, le porteur récupère +{unit_stat|WarhammerAgility|bonus} PD et ne provoque pas d'attaques d'opportunité jusqu'à la fin de son tour.

languages.text: 使用者の近接攻撃が回避、受け流し、クリティカルヒットされた場合、使用者のMPを+{unit_stat|WarhammerAgility|bonus}回復し、ターンの終了まで機会攻撃を引き起こさない。
languages.original_text: If the wearer's melee attack is dodged, parried, or scores a critical hit, the wearer regains +{unit_stat|WarhammerAgility|bonus} MP and does not provoke attacks of opportunity until the end of their turn.

traits.locale_text: 使用者の近接攻撃が回避、受け流し、クリティカルヒットされた場合、使用者のMPを+{unit_stat|WarhammerAgility|bonus}回復し、ターンの終了まで機会攻撃を引き起こさない。
使用者の近接攻撃が回避、受け流し、クリティカルヒットされた場合、使用者のMPを+{unit_stat|WarhammerAgility|bonus}回復し、ターンの終了まで機会攻撃を引き起こさない。

languages.text: Если атака персонажа в {g|Encyclopedia:MeleeAttacksGlossary}ближнем бою{/g} {g|Encyclopedia:Parry}парирована{/g}, если цель от нее {g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}уклонилась{/g} или если эта атака нанесла {g|Encyclopedia:CritChancesAndCritDamageGlossary}критическое попадание{/g}, персонаж восстанавливает +{unit_stat|WarhammerAgility|bonus} {g|Encyclopedia:MovementPoints}ОП{/g} и не провоцирует {g|Encyclopedia:AttackOfOpportunityFullGlossary}атаки по возможности{/g} до конца своего {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}хода{/g}.
languages.original_text: If the wearer's melee attack is dodged, parried, or scores a critical hit, the wearer regains +{unit_stat|WarhammerAgility|bonus} MP and does not provoke attacks of opportunity until the end of their turn.

traits.locale_text: Если атака персонажа в ближнем бою парирована, если цель от нее уклонилась или если эта атака нанесла критическое попадание, персонаж восстанавливает +{unit_stat|WarhammerAgility|bonus} ОП и не провоцирует атаки по возможности до конца своего хода.

Если атака персонажа в ближнем бою парирована, если цель от нее уклонилась или если эта атака нанесла критическое попадание, персонаж восстанавливает +{unit_stat|WarhammerAgility|bonus} ОП и не провоцирует атаки по возможности до конца своего хода.
